samples.text: If the heater is switched on, then the room becomes warm. The heater is switched on. Does it follow that the room becomes warm?
Whenever the heater is switched on, the room becomes warm as a result. In this case the heater is switched on. Can we conclude that the room becomes warm?
If the heater is activated, then the room heats up. The heater is activated. Does it follow that the room heats up?
The condition for 'the room becomes warm' is met because the heater is switched on. Does it follow that the room becomes warm?
If the heater is switched on, then the room becomes warm. The heater is switched on. The weather today is cloudy. Does it follow that the room becomes warm?
